{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221922538B0EF2943603D954B383"}"},"total":100},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7528389462901097278","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看人物心理描写很棒"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752843752,"group_id":"7514530058103426073","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Ef3Uk1hv8rC7jew8hejHDv2VcDETHrAJZwTd8aovFb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1852031573951694","user_name":"潘塔尔岛的于大娘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1852031573951694","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7514530058103426073","book_info":{"abstract":"［无系统，无面板，主角基本靠自己的努力，一步步改变麦迪模板最大的弱点——耐操性不足。］

苏阳穿越到2010年下半年的NBA选秀大会上，他发现自己成为了落选秀。
麦迪的模板如果早一些加载，也不至于落选啊！
面对现实的苏阳，本想少走40年弯路，直接干保安。
没想到偶遇欧神仙后，竟然被科比发觉了他的“最快第一步”。
从此，作为选秀遗珠，他进入了湖人。
如今的湖人，刚完成两连冠，阵容老化，伤病增多，巴斯家族内部斗争严重。
而苏阳熟悉未来的剧情，奉劝科比打养生球，只有常规赛养生，才能在季后赛发力。
由于苏阳的出现，科比并没有跟腱断裂，原本的历史线发生了改变。
没有什么追击悲剧，瓦妮莎也没怀别人的孩子。
苏阳本人，更是接过了湖人的大权，实现了一段辉煌的职业生涯。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1e4d2f738bfb36f6935297d6d2fdb6fb","author":"石缝里的豌豆","author_id":"","book_id":"7514530058103426073","book_name":"模板麦迪，辅助科比第二个三连冠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#000838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7514530240996065817","read_count":"36785","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1110326"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"531","tags":"游戏体育,体育,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4924af9b2a27b4f25c3bc308a7992a49~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362573&x-signature=FqTNImPRiIEWwC58Bc1hmYz%2Bjpo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3601623788033772","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221922538B0EF2943603D954B383"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11431,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8646},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"75710
